---
title: "Urban Geography"
subtitle: "The study of cities, urban processes, morphology, and spatial patterns of urbanization."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---

{{< include urban-geography/00-syllabus.md >}}

---

Welcome to the **Urban Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare.

---

## Part A: Common Topics (NEP-2020 & UGC NET)

These topics are covered in both the NEP-2020 undergraduate syllabus and the UGC NET syllabus.

{{< include urban-geography/01-concepts-of-urban-geography.md >}}

{{< include urban-geography/02-classification-of-towns.md >}}

{{< include urban-geography/03-urban-morphology-models.md >}}

{{< include urban-geography/04-central-place-theory.md >}}

{{< include urban-geography/05-urban-fringe-and-slums.md >}}

---

## Part B: NEP-2020 Specific Topics

These topics are part of the NEP-2020 undergraduate programme only.

{{< include urban-geography/06-trends-of-urbanization.md >}}

---

## Part C: UGC NET Specific Topics

These topics are part of the UGC NET syllabus only.

{{< include urban-geography/07-rank-size-and-primate-city.md >}}

---


---

## Quick Reference

{{< include urban-geography/08-quick-reference.md >}}

---
